metadata.title: Data · Kolawoles
metadata.description: BI Engineering & Analytics — Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, Python, SQL. Adefemi Kolawole.

hero.description: Senior BI Engineer with 8+ years in the Microsoft data ecosystem. I build reporting systems that turn complex operational data into clear, actionable intelligence for stakeholders at every level.

projects.title: Behavioral Health Performance Platform
projects.problem: Operational and financial reporting was fragmented across 20 providers, making cross-provider performance difficult to monitor.
projects.solution: Built a 15-page Power BI reporting system with a Python ETL pipeline and SharePoint ingestion through Microsoft Graph API.
projects.impact: Delivered a single performance view for staffing, census, finance, CPO, and SE metrics to support faster county-level decisions.

projects.title: Hospital Operations Intelligence Layer
projects.problem: Leaders lacked a consistent way to compare operational and clinical performance across departments.
projects.solution: Designed dimensional models and semantic reporting layers, then shipped executive dashboards for shared KPI visibility.
projects.impact: Improved executive reporting consistency and reduced decision latency across departmental stakeholders.

projects.title: Insurance Portfolio Analytics Hub
projects.problem: Business teams relied on ad hoc requests for visibility into policy and claims behavior.
projects.solution: Built a self-service analytics layer for underwriting and claims, backed by modeled data and reusable metrics.
projects.impact: Enabled business users to explore portfolio performance independently and reduced reporting dependence on IT.

projects.title: Logistics KPI Command Center
projects.problem: Core supply chain metrics were distributed across separate reports and difficult to track in one flow.
projects.solution: Created consolidated KPI dashboards for warehouse operations, order fulfillment, and carrier performance tracking.
projects.impact: Provided operations teams with a unified view of logistics health and clearer bottleneck detection.

projects.title: Retail Performance Reporting Suite
projects.problem: Teams needed clearer visibility into membership and inventory performance across locations.
projects.solution: Built dashboard suites for department and regional analysis with focused membership and inventory reporting.
projects.impact: Improved planning conversations by standardizing retail performance insights across business units.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I deliver full-stack web engineering services with a strong focus on TypeScript, clean API design, and maintainable product architecture.
I combine application engineering with BI consulting capability to deliver data-informed platforms that improve reporting, operations, and business decision-making.
